title: Session State
description: Visible session planning helps multi-step work stay coherent.

steps.content: Add a small CLI script and a short usage example in the docs.
steps.annotation: This is small enough for a checklist but large enough to benefit from planning.

steps.annotation: The checklist is now visible to both the user and the model.

steps.content: The script is in place, and the remaining documentation step is still visible in session state.
steps.annotation: Session state tracks the current line of work without pretending to be durable project storage.
